source_schemas.name: raw_kaggle_stock_news_v1
source_schemas.notes: Demo shape for Kaggle stock-news rows. Real ingestion should map the downloaded dataset columns into this contract and preserve the dataset snapshot identifier.

source_schemas.name: raw_finnhub_company_news_v1
source_schemas.notes: Mirrors the common Finnhub company-news item shape with epoch-second publication time and ticker in related.

source_schemas.name: raw_alpha_vantage_news_sentiment_v1
source_schemas.notes: Mirrors Alpha Vantage NEWS_SENTIMENT feed items, including nested topic and ticker sentiment arrays.

source_schemas.name: raw_alpha_vantage_daily_bars_v1
source_schemas.notes: Preserves Alpha Vantage numbered OHLCV field names so the normalizer demonstrates provider-to-canonical mapping.

source_schemas.name: raw_tiingo_daily_bars_v1
source_schemas.notes: Mirrors Tiingo daily prices with adjusted fields, dividend cash, and split factor.

source_schemas.name: raw_finnhub_company_profile_v1
source_schemas.notes: Mirrors the company profile shape used for reference-data joins.

source_schemas.name: raw_tiingo_symbol_metadata_v1
source_schemas.notes: Represents Tiingo ticker metadata used to enrich provider reference data.

source_schemas.name: raw_alpha_vantage_company_overview_v1
source_schemas.notes: Mirrors Alpha Vantage COMPANY_OVERVIEW-style fundamentals fields.

source_schemas.name: clean_news_candidate_v1
source_schemas.notes: Canonical news shape consumed by quality checks and feature joins.

source_schemas.name: clean_price_bars_candidate_v1
source_schemas.notes: Canonical daily OHLCV shape after Alpha Vantage and Tiingo normalization.

source_schemas.name: clean_company_reference_candidate_v1
source_schemas.notes: Canonical company reference shape for cross-provider joins.

source_schemas.name: training_market_feature_panel_candidate_v1
source_schemas.notes: Point-in-time feature panel shape for demonstrating trusted-training promotion.
